description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy shaped like a bear, featuring a soft, brown, fabric exterior with a subtle woven texture. The bear has a rounded head with two small, circular ears, black button-like eyes, and a small, dark snout. Its belly is covered with a lighter gray patch, and visible stitching runs along the seams, giving it a hand-crafted appearance. The arms and legs are short and slightly outstretched, with the limbs and body appearing plump and filled with a soft material. The back is plain brown with no additional markings or features. This toy is designed to be cuddly and approachable, suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban parks or residential areas.
description: A soft, brown stuffed bear with a lighter gray belly patch, button eyes, and visible stitched seams. Its plump body and outstretched limbs give it a cuddly, hand-crafted look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, button eyes, snout, lighter gray belly patch, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bear's profile, rounded snout, ear, and the seam running along the side of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brown back, rounded head, and the back of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bear's profile, similar to the left, with visible stitching and the side of the gray belly patch.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with round black eyes and a small, simple snout. There is no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs spread apart, the head facing forward.
